tracks.name: TR-V — Verify substrate honesty
tracks.description: For each substrate item shipped in v1+v2 (T9-3 webhooks, T2-5 soft-bounce, T1-6 A/B picker, T6-9 vote-cast auto-detect, T5-1 auto-debate-spawn, NEW-E-1..5 wire-ups), trace the writer side and confirm it actually fires under realistic conditions. Each verify task either confirms honesty with file:line citations or surfaces a new fix task.

tracks.name: TR-D — Schema drift cleanup
tracks.description: Catalog and remove orphaned fields / unmaintained denormalized counters / unused indexes. Memory already flags users.encryptedEmail/encryptedName as deprecated post-PII-elimination — full sweep across the 90 tables.

tracks.name: TR-S — Seed coverage expansion
tracks.description: Bring seed.ts up to date with v1+v2 substrate. 9 product-meaningful unseeded tables (orgWebhooks, accountabilityReceipts, bills+legislativeActions, scorecardSnapshots, agentTraces, apiKeys, smsBlasts, templateEndorsements, notifications) plus per-table example records demonstrating end-to-end flow.

tracks.name: TR-T — Integration tests over substrate
tracks.description: Vitest integration specs proving the substrate works end-to-end against seeded data. Catches regression of the substrate-honesty claims this hypergraph is verifying.
